src: var tw = ctx.typewriter('OpenCat Animation Showcase', { duration: 24, easing: 'linear', caret: '▍' }); ctx.getNode('title').text(tw.text); ctx.animate({ targets: 'subtitle', from: { opacity: 0, translateY: -10 }, to: { opacity: 1, translateY: 0 }, duration: 30, delay: 24, easing: 'spring-gentle' }); ctx.animate({ targets: 'e-ball-1', from: { translateX: 0 }, to: { translateX: 380 }, duration: 50, easing: 'back-out', repeat: -1, yoyo: true }); ctx.animate({ targets: 'e-ball-2', from: { translateX: 0 }, to: { translateX: 380 }, duration: 50, easing: 'elastic-out', repeat: -1, yoyo: true }); ctx.animate({ targets: 'e-ball-3', from: { translateX: 0 }, to: { translateX: 380 }, duration: 50, easing: 'bounce-out', repeat: -1, yoyo: true }); ctx.animate({ targets: 'e-ball-4', from: { translateX: 0 }, to: { translateX: 380 }, duration: 50, easing: 'steps(8)', repeat: -1, yoyo: true }); ctx.animate({ targets: 'kf-scale', keyframes: { scale: [1, 1.4, 0.8, 1.2, 1] }, duration: 70, repeat: -1 }); ctx.animate({ targets: 'kf-rot', keyframes: { rotate: [{ at: 0, value: 0 }, { at: 0.5, value: 360, easing: 'back-out' }, { at: 1, value: 0 }] }, duration: 70, repeat: -1 }); ctx.animate({ targets: 'color-swatch', from: { bg: '#ef4444' }, to: { bg: '#22c55e' }, duration: 50, easing: 'ease-in-out', repeat: -1, yoyo: true }); ctx.animate({ targets: 'color-text', from: { textColor: '#fbbf24' }, to: { textColor: '#38bdf8' }, duration: 50, easing: 'ease-in-out', repeat: -1, yoyo: true }); ctx.animate({ targets: 'rocket', path: 'M30 180 C180 40 430 300 580 60', orient: 0, duration: 60, easing: 'ease-in-out', repeat: -1, yoyo: true }); ctx.stagger(0, { targets: ['s-0','s-1','s-2','s-3','s-4','s-5','s-6','s-7'], from: { scale: 1, opacity: 0.4 }, to: { scale: 1.6, opacity: 1 }, duration: 20, gap: 4, easing: 'spring-wobbly', repeat: -1, yoyo: true }); for (var j = 0; j < 8; j++) { ctx.getNode('s-' + j).translateY(ctx.utils.random(-4, 4, j * 31 + 7)); }
